summary: Final implementation plan (v3) for converting POV biography pipeline from phase-based to event timeline. Includes: (1) Phase plan outputs flat event_timeline with event_description, (2) Validate checks completeness + auto-fixes, (3) Outline builds scene_open/action/close from events + handles chapter splitting, (4) Rollback strategy via backup folder. All changes are POV-only behind _is_pov branching.
